title: Schedule Your Consultation
intro_title: Your Path to Healing Begins with a Conversation.
intro_text: Because the therapeutic relationship is the most important factor in your success, a 15-minute consultation call is a required first step for all new clients.

options.label: Free Parking
options.text: The Liberty Street parking lot at 204 Liberty St, SW typically has the best availability.

options.label: Alternative
options.text: The Town Hall garage at 10 Loudoun St, SW is a reliable paid option.

options.label: Street Parking
options.text: Metered spots are available on Wirt St SW.

arrival.title: Arriving for Your Session
arrival.text: Please use the side entrance located on the left side of the building (marked for upper-level suites). Head up the stairs to our quiet waiting area. I will greet you exactly at our scheduled appointment time.
